runs.note: Updated logger.js to implement security event logging as per the LOGGING_POLICY.md and DATA_CLASSIFICATION.md documents. Sensitive data like passwords and session tokens are masked or omitted from the logs. All security events are now recorded in the logEntries array and can be retrieved via the getLogEntries() function.
